/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++14 -Wno-deprecated-register -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/ps-lut.dir/main.cpp.o" -o ../../../bin/ps-lut  ../../../lib/libpeval.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib
